year.rationale: Indicates the recency of the research.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research.

doi.rationale: Unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.description: Conference or journal where the paper was published

problem_statement.description: Description of the problem addressed by the paper
problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the motivation behind the research.

problem_description.rationale: Helps in understanding the significance of the research.

challenges.description: List of challenges faced in addressing the problem
challenges.rationale: Highlights obstacles that the research aims to overcome.

methodology.description: Research methodology used in the paper
methodology.rationale: Explains how the research was conducted.

data_preparation.rationale: Essential for reproducibility of the research.

algorithm_classification.rationale: Organizes the different approaches examined in the study.

evaluation_metrics.description: Metrics used for evaluating the algorithms
evaluation_metrics.rationale: Important for assessing the effectiveness of the proposed solutions.

experiments.description: Experiments conducted to validate the research
experiments.rationale: Demonstrates the practicality of the proposed methods.

experiment_design.rationale: Provides insight into how the experiments were structured.

results.rationale: Summarizes the findings that support the paper's conclusions.
Highlights the outcomes of the research.

findings.rationale: Essential for understanding the contributions of the paper.

comparative_analysis.description: Comparison with existing methods or approaches
comparative_analysis.rationale: Contextualizes the contributions within the field.

datasets_used.rationale: Critical for replicating the study's results.

code_availability.description: Link to the code repository if available
code_availability.rationale: Enables others to implement the findings.

future_directions.rationale: Encourages ongoing exploration in the field.
